_meta.purpose: Last-resort BNPB IRBI vulnerability scores for DKI Jakarta kotamadya when the live InaRISK API is unreachable.
_meta.irbi_scale: Normalised [0.0, 1.0] flood vulnerability index. 0.0 = lowest, 1.0 = highest.
notes: Used by app.services.bnpb_context.fetch_bnpb_data() when the live API returns empty or raises.
All scores were the operating defaults at the time this file was last reviewed; refresh whenever InaRISK publishes a new dataset.
